info.title: Foundation Platform Catalog API
info.description: Versioned canonical Catalog, parcel, building, and spatial artifact API.

ArchiveComplexRequest.description: Request body for archiving an industrial complex with optimistic concurrency.

if_match_version.description: Version observed by the caller; stale values return conflict.

reason.description: Optional human-readable archive reason for audit.

BlueprintResponse.description: Blueprint or drawing metadata assigned to an industrial complex.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this blueprint.

coordinate_system.description: Coordinate reference system used by the drawing.

file_asset_id.description: File asset that stores the blueprint object.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the blueprint.

scale.description: Optional scale label from the source drawing.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

BuildingResponse.description: Canonical building response for buildings assigned to industrial-complex parcels.

below_ground_floors.description: Number of below-ground (basement) floors. `0` when none or unknown.

built_year.description: Construction year from the official source.

floor_area_m2.description: Official floor area in square meters.

has_rooftop.description: Whether the building has a rooftop (옥탑) structure counted as a floor.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the building.

rooftop_area_m2.description:
옥탑 공용부 allocated area (㎡) reconciled from 전유공용면적. `null` when the
building has no rooftop.

rooftop_usage.description:
옥탑 용도 (주용도 · 기타용도) reconciled from 전유공용면적. Empty when the
building has no rooftop.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

ComplexAnchorSummaryResponse.description: Anchor-derived map summary for one industrial complex.

anchor_count.description: Number of active parcel anchors represented by this summary.

center_lat.description: Average latitude of active parcel anchors in EPSG:4326.

center_lng.description: Average longitude of active parcel anchors in EPSG:4326.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex whose active parcel anchors were summarized.

max_lat.description: Maximum active anchor latitude in EPSG:4326.

max_lng.description: Maximum active anchor longitude in EPSG:4326.

min_lat.description: Minimum active anchor latitude in EPSG:4326.

min_lng.description: Minimum active anchor longitude in EPSG:4326.

position_source.description: Canonical source for the summary coordinates. Current value: `pnu_anchor`.

ComplexNoticeResponse.description: Official notice or announcement attached to an industrial complex.

attachments.description: File attachments linked to the notice.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this notice.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the notice.

published_at.description: Publication timestamp when the source provides one.

summary.description: Optional short summary prepared for list views.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

DigitalTwinAssetResponse.description: Digital twin asset metadata assigned below an industrial complex.

building_id.description: Optional building identifier when the asset represents a building.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this asset.

coordinate_transform.description: Optional coordinate transform payload for renderer alignment.

file_asset_id.description: File asset that stores the 3D or visualization artifact.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the digital twin asset.

parcel_id.description: Optional parcel that narrows the asset scope.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

FileAssetResponse.description: Provider-neutral file metadata owned by foundation-platform Catalog.

checksum_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum in lowercase hexadecimal form.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the file asset.

mime_type.description: MIME type recorded for the object.

object_key.description: Provider-neutral object storage key. This intentionally avoids S3/R2-specific naming.

title.description: Optional display title for UI surfaces.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

IndustrialComplexGoldPointerResponse.description: Thin pointer to R2/Iceberg Gold industrial-complex data.

iceberg_snapshot_id.description: Iceberg snapshot id represented by the artifact.

previous_version.description: Previously active Gold artifact version, when one existed.

profile_checksum_sha256.description: SHA-256 checksum for the profile artifact.

profile_object_key.description: Provider-neutral object key for the Gold profile artifact.

profile_row_count.description: Number of profile rows represented by the artifact.

published_at.description: UTC timestamp when the pointer was published.

source_record_id.description: Source record that describes the publish input.

source_snapshot_id.description: Source snapshot represented by the artifact.

spatial_locator_object_key.description: Provider-neutral object key for the optional spatial locator artifact.

IndustrialComplexResponse.description: Canonical industrial complex response owned by foundation-platform Catalog.

archived_at.description: UTC timestamp when the complex was archived, if no longer active.

area_m2.description: Official complex area in square meters.

oneOf.description: Current R2/Iceberg Gold pointer for heavy industrial-complex detail.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the complex.

kind.description: Industrial complex kind as a public wire value.

primary_bjdong_code.description: primary legal-dong code shared by parcels that belong to the complex.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

IndustryGroupMemberResponse.description: Single industry code inside an industry group.

industry_code.description: Industry code value, for example a KSIC code.

IndustryGroupResponse.description: Industry grouping allowed or recommended inside an industrial complex.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this industry group.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the industry group.

members.description: Industry code members that make up the group.

name.description: Display name of the industry group.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

ManufacturerResponse.description: Manufacturer read response that deliberately omits sensitive business identifiers.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the manufacturer.

primary_parcel_id.description: Primary parcel occupied by the manufacturer.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

MarkerTileContractResponse.description: Public contract for PNU-anchor backed marker tile endpoints.

aggregate_anchor_max_zoom.description: Highest zoom level served by aggregate anchor artifacts.

bbox_marker_runtime_forbidden.description: Public launch marker requests must not be based on arbitrary bbox inputs.

db_reference_endpoint_launch_forbidden.description: Database-backed reference endpoint must not be treated as the launch hot path.

db_reference_endpoint_scope.description: Intended scope for the database-backed marker endpoint.

default_filter_hash.description: Default filter identity for the supported anchor layer.

dropped_marker_success_forbidden.description: Successful marker responses must not silently drop eligible records.

exact_anchor_min_zoom.description: Lowest zoom level where exact parcel anchors may be requested.

launch_runtime_source.description: Canonical launch runtime for static marker tiles.

position_source.description: Canonical source for marker positions. Current value: `pnu_anchor`.

response_format.description: Wire response format for map-wide marker surfaces. Current value: `mvt_pbf`.

runtime_manifest_endpoint.description: Runtime manifest endpoint consumed before clients materialize tile URLs.

supported_layers.description: Marker layers currently supported by the public tile endpoint.

ParcelIndustryAssignmentResponse.description: Assignment between a parcel and an industry group.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the assignment.

industry_group_id.description: Industry group assigned to the parcel.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

ParcelMarkerAnchorRebuildRequest.description: Request body for rebuilding parcel marker anchors from an approved mirror snapshot.

source_snapshot_id.description: Approved Iceberg snapshot represented by the `PostGIS` mirror rows.

ParcelMarkerAnchorRebuildResponse.description: Response body returned after a parcel marker anchor rebuild finishes.

rejected_row_count.description: Mirror rows rejected before writing anchors.

scanned_row_count.description: Mirror rows inspected for this snapshot.

source_snapshot_id.description: Approved Iceberg snapshot represented by the rebuild.

source_table.description: Canonical source table represented by the rebuild.

superseded_row_count.description: Previously active anchors superseded for the same PNUs.

ParcelResponse.description: Canonical parcel response for a parcel inside an industrial complex.

area_m2.description: Official parcel area in square meters.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this parcel.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the parcel.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

PromoteFileAssetRequest.description: File asset payload supplied during vector tile manifest promote.

checksum_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum in lowercase hexadecimal form.

mime_type.description: MIME type recorded for the object.

object_key.description: Provider-neutral object storage key. This intentionally avoids S3/R2-specific naming.

title.description: Optional display title for UI surfaces.

PromoteSourceRecordRequest.description: Source record payload supplied during vector tile manifest promote.

checksum_sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 checksum in lowercase hexadecimal form.

raw_object_key.description: Optional provider-neutral object key for the raw source artifact.

PromoteVectorTileArtifactRequest.description: Per-layer artifact payload supplied during vector tile manifest promote.

flat_tile_count.description: Number of flat tile objects generated for this layer.

flat_tile_total_bytes.description: Total bytes across flat tile objects for this layer.

object_key_prefix.description: Provider-neutral prefix that contains this layer's tile objects.

render_max_zoom.description: Maximum zoom level where clients should render the layer.

render_min_zoom.description: Minimum zoom level where clients should render the layer.

source_file_assets.description: Source file assets used to build this layer.

source_layer.description: Source layer name embedded in the vector tile payload.

tile_max_zoom.description: Maximum zoom level available in stored tiles.

tile_min_zoom.description: Minimum zoom level available in stored tiles.

tilejson_file_asset.description: File asset metadata for this layer's `TileJSON` document.

PromoteVectorTileManifestRequest.description: Request body for promoting a vector tile build into the active manifest slot.

artifacts.description: Layer artifacts keyed by logical layer name.

current_version.description: Version that should become active after promote.

expected_current_version.description: Active version the caller expects before promote.

manifest_file_asset.description: File asset metadata for the manifest JSON artifact.

source_record.description: Source record describing the build input.

tiles_url_template.description: URL template clients use to request vector tiles.

RegisterComplexRequest.description: Request body for registering an industrial complex.

area_m2.description: Official complex area in square meters.

primary_bjdong_code.description: primary legal-dong code shared by parcels that belong to the complex.

RollbackVectorTileManifestRequest.description: Request body for manually rolling back the active vector tile manifest.

expected_current_version.description: Active version the caller expects before rollback.

reason.description: Human-readable rollback reason for audit logs.

to_version.description: Version that should become active after rollback.

SpatialLayerResponse.description: Geospatial layer metadata assigned below an industrial complex.

blueprint_id.description: Optional blueprint that the layer overlays.

complex_id.description: Industrial complex that owns this layer.

geometry_object_key.description: Optional object key for the geometry artifact.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the spatial layer.

parcel_id.description: Optional parcel that narrows the layer scope.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last canonical Catalog update.

version.description: Monotonic record version used for optimistic concurrency.

UnitResponse.description: Canonical 전유부 호 (building unit) response for a parcel.

building_name.description: 건물명 (normalized building name, may be empty).

dong_name.description: 동명칭 — only real 동 numbers; empty otherwise.

exclusive_area_m2.description: 전유면적 (exclusive area, m²), reconciled from 전유공용면적. `null` when unmatched.

floor_label.description: Floor label (지상/지하 + number), free text from source.

id.description: Stable foundation-platform identifier for the unit.

structure_name.description: 구조명, reconciled from 전유공용면적. Empty when unmatched.

usage_name.description: 주용도명, reconciled from 전유공용면적. Empty when unmatched.

UpdateComplexRequest.description: Request body for updating canonical industrial-complex metadata with optimistic concurrency.

area_m2.description: Optional replacement official complex area in square meters.

if_match_version.description: Version observed by the caller; stale values return conflict.

name.description: Optional replacement human-readable industrial complex name.

UpdateParcelKindRequest.description: Request body for updating a parcel kind with optimistic concurrency.

if_match_version.description: Version observed by the caller; stale values return conflict.

VectorTileArtifactResponse.description: Per-layer vector tile artifact metadata inside the runtime manifest.

feature_filter_properties.description: Logical filter properties mapped to concrete feature property names in the vector tile.

flat_tile_count.description: Number of flat tile objects generated for this layer.

flat_tile_total_bytes.description: Total bytes across flat tile objects for this layer.

lineage.description: Source and file lineage that produced this artifact.

object_key_prefix.description: Provider-neutral prefix that contains this layer's tile objects.

render_max_zoom.description: Maximum zoom level where clients should render the layer.

render_min_zoom.description: Minimum zoom level where clients should render the layer.

source_layer.description: Source layer name embedded in the vector tile payload.

tile_max_zoom.description: Maximum zoom level available in stored tiles.

tile_min_zoom.description: Minimum zoom level available in stored tiles.

tilejson_object_key.description: Provider-neutral object key for this layer's `TileJSON` document.

VectorTileLineageResponse.description: Lineage links required to audit a vector tile artifact.

manifest_file_asset_id.description: File asset row for the manifest JSON file.

source_file_asset_ids.description: File asset rows for source files used to build the layer.

source_record_id.description: Source record that describes the tile build input.

tilejson_file_asset_id.description: File asset row for the layer `TileJSON` file.

VectorTileManifestResponse.description: Runtime vector tile manifest consumed by Gongzzang map surfaces.

artifacts.description: Layer artifacts keyed by logical layer name, for example `parcels`.

previous_version.description: Previously active tile artifact version retained for rollback awareness.

published_at.description: UTC timestamp when this manifest became active.

tiles_url_template.description: URL template for vector tile requests.
